needs_human_review.message: The ResetPassword InputModel class adds [Display(Name = "Email")] and [Display(Name = "Password")] attributes, but the ConfirmPassword property does not get a [Display] attribute. This inconsistency may cause the label for ConfirmPassword to be missing or incorrectly rendered when using DisplayName in the Razor view.
needs_human_review.suggestion: Add a [Display(Name = "Confirm password")] attribute to the ConfirmPassword property in the InputModel class to match the pattern used for Email and Password.

context_requests.reason: The security_sensitive risk signal has high confidence but the primary evidence only shows DisplayName attribute additions. Need to verify if there is any actual security boundary change or exposure introduced.
The security_sensitive risk signal has no expanded evidence. Need to see the actual diff hunks to determine if a concrete security issue was introduced.

needs_human_review.message: The ResetPassword InputModel class adds [Display(Name = "Email")] and [Display(Name = "Password")] attributes, but the ConfirmPassword property does not get a [Display] attribute. This inconsistency may cause the label for ConfirmPassword to be missing or incorrectly rendered when using DisplayName in the Razor view.
needs_human_review.suggestion: Add a [Display(Name = "Confirm password")] attribute to the ConfirmPassword property in the InputModel class to match the pattern used for Email and Password.
